---
title: "GIS & Remote Sensing"
subtitle: "Geospatial technologies for mapping, analysis, and Earth observation."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include gis-remote-sensing/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

Welcome to the **GIS & Remote Sensing** module of Geography OpenCourseWare.

---

## Part A: Common Topics (NEP-2020 & UGC NET)

These topics are covered in both the NEP-2020 undergraduate syllabus and the UGC NET syllabus.

{{< include gis-remote-sensing/01-remote-sensing-fundamentals.md >}}

{{< include gis-remote-sensing/02-gis-data-models.md >}}

{{< include gis-remote-sensing/03-image-interpretation.md >}}

{{< include gis-remote-sensing/04-spatial-analysis.md >}}

{{< include gis-remote-sensing/05-applications-of-rs-gis.md >}}

---
